manifest.title: Variables: Static, Runtime & Computed Example
manifest.description: Focused E3 example covering all three variable kinds in one document: a static string variable (env), a runtime-settable integer with a default (window), and a computed variable derived from the others via an expr (heading). The variables feed both a ${} string template and {"$var"} typed bindings on a descendant table. The resolved tree carries each node's varEnv (the variables in scope, with their resolved defaults and declaredAt). Conforms to https://lattice.dev/schemas/dashboard/1.0.0.
manifest.author: Lattice
